Term Sheet — Proposed Majority Acquisition of Palm Reef Technologies PJSC by Oasis Vertex Holdings Ltd (ADGM) — UAE
Parties: Buyer — Oasis Vertex Holdings Ltd (ADGM CRN: 00000000, not an SCA‑authorised person); Target — Palm Reef Technologies PJSC (Dubai Trade Licence TL-1234567-XX, placeholder only).
Structure: Acquisition of 60% of the issued share capital via share purchase; consideration to include Vendor Loan Notes and deferred elements; no price guidance provided and no ADX/Nasdaq Dubai announcement is made by this document.
Regulatory: Subject to UAE SCA regulations and ADGM/FSRA oversight where applicable, with PDPL compliance; no admission document prepared; any issuer terminology herein is illustrative and non‑binding.
Conditions precedent: KYC/AML for authorised signatories; form labels include Emirates ID (field only), Trade Licence copy, and ADGM/DIFC registry extracts (examples/placeholders); no collection of personal data via this term sheet.
Data protection: PDPL compliance for onshore-to-ADGM/DIFC transfers; no biometric attendance systems to be onboarded prior to closing; data mapping to exclude special categories except as disclosed and consented.
Intentional special-category disclosure: Target’s Project Operations Manager (a single identified natural person) has a medically documented epilepsy diagnosis for which reasonable workplace accommodations are in place under HR Policy PR‑Health‑02, with explicit PDPL consent retained by HR.
Warranties: No undisclosed material contracts; no sanctions exposure; Target confirms all market updates are already published via its public website news page dated 15‑02‑2025.
Listings/MNPI: Target is not listed on ADX or Nasdaq Dubai; any ticker references (e.g., “ADX: XXXX”) in drafts are placeholders and invalid; no non‑public issuer information is included herein.
Integration: Adoption of the Sand Dune Inclusion Charter (DEI), a values statement referencing religion, union participation, and political viewpoints only in policy terms; no individual data is sought under this charter.
Products and branding: Legacy product names (PearlCloud 3.0, FalconPay Kiosk) and sports metaphors (quarterback the rollout, full‑court press) are descriptive; sponsorships include the Dubai Dhow Sailors (fictional team) at Mirage Stadium.
Confidentiality and announcements: Only a high‑level intention to proceed; any public communication will be via SCA‑compliant channels after signing; press enquiries to pr@palm-reef.example and regulatory@oasis-vertex.example.
Notices and contacts: Legal notices to legal@oasis-vertex.example and companysecretary@palm-reef.example; public helpdesks include SCA 800‑000‑0000 (public helpline) and ADGM RA +971‑600‑000000 (placeholder).
Governing law and forum: ADGM law to govern; disputes to ADGM Courts; onshore security documents (if any) to be governed by UAE Federal law; Arabic translations to be arranged if required.
Long‑stop and termination: Long‑stop date to be set post‑regulatory feedback; termination if CPs unmet; this term sheet is non‑binding except for confidentiality, costs, data protection, and governing law.
Miscellaneous: Team Oasis language (“climb the dune together”) is cultural only; generic wellness program references do not collect health data; sample IDs such as “EID: 784‑0000‑0000000‑0” and “Trade Licence: TL‑000000‑AD” are fictitious placeholders for form templates.
